recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: Ilo Ilo
recommendations.overview: During the late 1990s, a busy working-class Singaporean couple hires a Filipino woman as a maid and nanny to their young son.

recommendations.title: What?
recommendations.overview: A young American woman traveling through Italy finds herself in a strange Mediterranean villa where nothing seems quite right.

recommendations.title: Sunday's Illness
recommendations.overview: Annabel is a successful businesswoman with a wealthy husband. At a reception in her villa she meets a woman, a member of the catering staff who has been hired for the evening. This woman is none other than her own daughter Chiara, whom she had left o

recommendations.title: The Lost Daughter
recommendations.overview: A woman's seaside vacation takes a dark turn when her obsession with a young mother forces her to confront secrets from her past.

recommendations.title: Polina
recommendations.overview: Polina is a young dancer from a modest family. After years of ballet academy, she is accepted by the Bolshoi; still, she decides to try and audition of a modern dance company in France. She makes it, but her journey will not end there...

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: A wealthy New Orleans businessman becomes obsessed with a young woman who resembles his late wife.

recommendations.title: The Unknown Woman
recommendations.overview: A Ukrainian woman named Irena calculatedly insinuates herself into the lives of a young, affluent Italian family. Stopping at nothing to become the couple's trusted maid and the beloved nanny to their fragile young daughter, Irena risks everything in

recommendations.title: Disorder
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier with PTSD is hired to protect the wife and child of a wealthy Lebanese businessman while he's out of town.
